title: Sapling Tweaks
description: Adds the ability to craft and crossbreed for saplings
body: # Sapling Tweaks Datapack *Elevate your Minecraft arboreal adventures with Sapling Tweaks, a datapack designed to revolutionize your sapling interactions. Bid farewell to waiting for drops – now you can easily enhance your sapling experiences.* ### Crafts ![Oak sapling craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41b2e15e4627f4b72b3ca977201be6838c01c410.png) ![Oak sapling crossbread](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1b0f3b4619ddd3e0c479d28cb4d6edc3d609a5ea.png) - Works with all saplings - See gallery for more ## How to Use: 1. Download the Sapling Tweaks Datapack. 2. Place the downloaded file into the "datapacks" folder in your Minecraft world save. 3. Dive into the enhanced world of sapling customization! ### Transform Your Grove: Immerse yourself in a world where sapling customization is at your fingertips. Sapling Tweaks empowers you to personalize your tree-filled landscape effortlessly, whether you're a seasoned planter or a casual adventurer. Cultivate, and let your green paradise flourish!
